examples: They spend an inordinate amount of time talking.
Either keeping personal creditors accounts or making sundry creditors adjustments can consume inordinate amounts of administrative and accounting time.
Babies and small children require an inordinate amount of clobber.
If you have the means, is spending an inordinate amount on pre-school a bad thing?
She said he became distant and spent an inordinate amount of time on the computer.
